es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http

Class HTTPBase

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.HTTPBase
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    HTTPClient, OkHTTPClient

    public abstract class HTTPBase
extends java.lang.Object
    HTTP base client wrapper.

      static void SetTlsClientCompatibleAlgorithm()
      Restricts the client authentication signature schemes to 'rsa_pkcs1'.

    • Method Detail

      • SetTlsClientCompatibleAlgorithm

        public static void SetTlsClientCompatibleAlgorithm()
        Restricts the client authentication signature schemes to 'rsa_pkcs1'.

      • getResponse

        public abstract int getResponse()
                         throws java.io.IOException
        Establish the connection and returns the status.
        Returns:
        HTTP code indicating the status of the connection.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if exception occurs.

      • getStreamResponse

        public abstract java.io.InputStream getStreamResponse()
                                               throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as stream.
        Returns:
        Stream with the content response.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if exception occurs.

      • getStringResponse

        public abstract java.lang.String getStringResponse()
                                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as string encoded in charset recovered in response headers.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as string.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if exception occurs.

      • getStringResponse

        public abstract java.lang.String getStringResponse(java.nio.charset.Charset charset)
                                            throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as string.
        Parameters:
        charset - Character encoding.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as string.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if exception occurs.

      • getByteArrayResponse

        public abstract byte[] getByteArrayResponse()
                                     throws java.io.IOException
        Get the response as byte array.
        Returns:
        Content of the response body as byte array.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if exception occurs.

      • getLastResponse

        public int getLastResponse()
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTTP response code of the last request.
        Returns:
        HTTP response code.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if there is no previous request.

      • getResponseHeaders

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.util.List<java.lang.String>> getResponseHeaders()
                                                                                    throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTTP response headers.
        Returns:
        HTTP response headers.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if there is no previous request.
